subsection.heading: Purpose
subsection.chapeau: The purpose of this section is to authorize the Preserve America Program, including—

paragraph.content: the Preserve America grant program within the Department of the Interior;
the recognition programs administered by the Advisory Council on Historic Preservation; and
the related efforts of Federal agencies, working in partnership with State, tribal, and local governments and the private sector, to support and promote the preservation of historic resources.

subsection.heading: to (f) Repealed. Pub. L. 113–287, § 7, Dec. 19, 2014, 128 Stat. 3272

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2014—Subsecs. (b) to (f). Pub. L. 113–287 struck out subsecs. (b) to (f), which related to definitions, establishment of Preserve America Program, designation of Preserve America Communities, regulations, and authorization of appropriations. See sections 311101 to 311105 of Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs.
